slides.image_prompt:
Slide 1/8 role=hook. Thai copy: ก่อนส่งไฟล์ให้ AI: ลบข้อมูลส่วนตัวให้เป็นนิสัย
Context • workflow • prompt • Make. Visual direction: bold cover slide, strong Thai headline based on the real source idea, cute robot mascot, practical AI design/workflow icons, small GenLabs logo in a corner. Hand-drawn Thai sketchnote infographic style. Balanced 50% useful Thai text and 50% graphics: cute robots, icons, arrows, marker lines, rounded cards, section badges, checkmarks, simple diagrams. Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. Render the Thai copy exactly as provided; do not substitute similar-looking Thai words or alter spelling. Thai spelling QA: use กฎ not กฏ, use ชัดขึ้น without an extra space, use โทนแบรนด์ not ทงแบรนด์, keep ด้วย AI ใน 5 ขั้นตอน together in that order, and keep product/tool names exactly as written. Include a small GenLabs logo/brand mark in a corner or footer, never oversized. Do not include analytics, learning-loop elements, or fake dashboards.

clean_brief.clean_summary: How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner) AI Tech Pubs Running a small business means wearing every hat — and drowning in tasks that eat your day before you even start the real work ... Transcript: How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner) Description How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner) 2 Likes 4 Views 8m Ago Running a small business means wearing every hat — and drowning in tasks that eat your day before you even start the real work. In this video I'll show you the exact 5 ChatGPT workflows I use every day to get 3 hours back — so you can focus on growing your business instead of managing it. These aren't generic tips. These are the specific prompts and systems I use daily for email triage, research, writing, planning, and decision making. ⏱ TIMESTAMPS [0:00]( Intro [0:45]( Workflow 1 — Email triage (save 35 min) [2:00]( Workflow 2 — Research & summarizing (save 40 min) [3:30]( Workflow 3 — Writing first drafts (save 35 min) [5:00]( Workflow 4 — Daily planning (save 25 min) [5:45]( Workflow 5 — Decision making (save 40 min) [5:55]( Free prompt pack 📋 THE 5 PROMPTS FROM THIS VIDEO Prompt 1 — Email Triage: "Here are my emails from this morning. For each one: summarize it in one sentence, tell me if it needs a reply today or can wait, and if it needs a reply today, draft a professional response in under 5 sentences. Emails: [paste emails]" Prompt 2 — Research Summary: "Summarize this in 5 bullet points. Then tell me: what are the 3 most important things I need to know as a small business owner, and is there anything I should be concerned about or act on urgently? [paste content]" Prompt 3 — First Draft: "Write a first draft of [type of content] for [audience]. Tone: [professional/warm/casual]. Key points: [list]. Keep it under [word count]. Don't make it sound AI-generated — write it like a real person who genuinely wants to help." Prompt 4 — Daily Planning: "Here is my task list for today. Organize these into a realistic time-blocked schedule. Put high-focus work in the morning and admin in the afternoon. Flag anything to delegate or delete, and tell me my single most important task to do first. I have [X] hours available. Tasks: [paste list]" Prompt 5 — Decision Making: "I need to decide [decision]. Context: [situation]. Give me: top 3 reasons to do it, top 3 reasons not to, what information I might be missing, and your honest recommendation." 🔧 TOOLS MENTIONED → ChatGPT: → Make.com: 📥 FREE DOWNLOAD → 50 ChatGPT Prompts for Business Owners — completely free: 🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly AI productivity videos — no hype, no fluff, just tools and systems that actually work for real businesses. ⚠️ DISCLAIMER: This video is for educational purposes only. No income or results are guaranteed. Some links in this description are affiliate links — I may earn a commission if you purchase through them at no extra cost to you. Full Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy: aitechpubs.com © 2026 AI Tech Pubs. All rights reserved.…...more ...more Show less Transcript Follow along using the transcript. clean_brief.raw_text:
YouTube title: How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner)
Channel: AI Tech Pubs
Description: Running a small business means wearing every hat — and drowning in tasks that eat your day before you even start the real work ...
Transcript:
Title: How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner) Description How I Use ChatGPT to Save 3 Hours Every Day (Small Business Owner) 2 Likes 4 Views 8m Ago Running a small business means wearing every hat — and drowning in tasks that eat your day before you even start the real work. In this video I'll show you the exact 5 ChatGPT workflows I use every day to get 3 hours back — so you can focus on growing your business instead of managing it. These aren't generic tips. These are the specific prompts and systems I use daily for email triage, research, writing, planning, and decision making. ⏱ TIMESTAMPS [0:00](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do) Intro [0:45](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=45s) Workflow 1 — Email triage (save 35 min) [2:00](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=120s) Workflow 2 — Research & summarizing (save 40 min) [3:30](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=210s) Workflow 3 — Writing first drafts (save 35 min) [5:00](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=300s) Workflow 4 — Daily planning (save 25 min) [5:45](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=345s) Workflow 5 — Decision making (save 40 min) [5:55](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZggFpdO6do&t=355s) Free prompt pack 📋 THE 5 PROMPTS FROM THIS VIDEO Prompt 1 — Email Triage: "Here are my emails from this morning. For each one: summarize it in one sentence, tell me if it needs a reply today or can wait, and if it needs a reply today, draft a professional response in under 5 sentences. Emails: [paste emails]" Prompt 2 — Research Summary: "Summarize this in 5 bullet points. Then tell me: what are the 3 most important things I need to know as a small business owner, and is there anything I should be concerned about or act on urgently? [paste content]" Prompt 3 — First Draft: "Write a first draft of [type of content] for [audience]. Tone: [professional/warm/casual]. Key points: [list]. Keep it under [word count]. Don't make it sound AI-generated — write it like a real person who genuinely wants to help." Prompt 4 — Daily Planning: "Here is my task list for today. Organize these into a realistic time-blocked schedule. Put high-focus work in the morning and admin in the afternoon. Flag anything to delegate or delete, and tell me my single most important task to do first. I have [X] hours available. Tasks: [paste list]" Prompt 5 — Decision Making: "I need to decide [decision]. Context: [situation]. Give me: top 3 reasons to do it, top 3 reasons not to, what information I might be missing, and your honest recommendation." 🔧 TOOLS MENTIONED → ChatGPT: https://chat.openai.com → Make.com: https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=aitech... 📥 FREE DOWNLOAD → 50 ChatGPT Prompts for Business Owners — completely free: https://www.aitechpubs.com/ 🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly AI productivity videos — no hype, no fluff, just tools and systems that actually work for real businesses. ⚠️ DISCLAIMER: This video is for educational purposes only. No income or results are guaranteed. Some links in this description are affiliate links — I may earn a commission if you purchase through them at no extra cost to you. generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: หลายคนอัปโหลดเอกสารให้ AI ทั้งที่ยังมีเบอร์โทร อีเมล เลขบัตร ที่อยู่ หรือลูกค้าจริงอยู่ในไฟล์

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: ประเด็นนี้สำคัญเพราะ AI ช่วยงานได้เร็ว แต่ความปลอดภัยต้องมาก่อน

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ ไฮไลต์ข้อมูลส่วนตัวก่อนอัปโหลด

2) ✨ แทนชื่อจริงด้วยคำว่า ลูกค้า A

3) ✨ ลบเลขบัตร เบอร์โทร และที่อยู่

4) ✨ ให้ AI ช่วยตรวจว่ามีข้อมูลเสี่ยงเหลือไหม

🧪 ลองเริ่มวันนี้: ก่อนใช้ AI กับเอกสารจริงวันนี้ ลองทำเช็กลิสต์ลบข้อมูลส่วนตัว 1 รอบ

🧭 วิธีใช้กับงานนี้: ไฮไลต์ข้อมูลส่วนตัวก่อนอัปโหลด → แทนชื่อจริงด้วยคำว่า ลูกค้า A → ลบเลขบัตร เบอร์โทร และที่อยู่

🌱 มือใหม่ให้เริ่มจากเคสจริงเล็ก ๆ ของอุตสาหกรรมนี้ แล้วให้คนในทีมตรวจคำตอบก่อนใช้กับลูกค้าจริง

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเห็นว่า AI ช่วยลดงานซ้ำและทำให้บริการชัดขึ้นได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
social_post.title: ก่อนส่งไฟล์ให้ AI: ลบข้อมูลส่วนตัวให้เป็นนิสัย #AIมือใหม่ เอาไปใช้กับงานจริงได้ทันที

evidence: This is trending because people can copy the workflow immediately instead of only reading AI news.
